title: Cache-Control Semantics
description: Design sophisticated caching hierarchies using Cache-Control directives. Explain the behavior and use cases of stale-while-revalidate, immutable, and must-revalidate. Evaluate the performance and freshness trade-offs of different caching strategies.
objectives: Design sophisticated caching hierarchies using Cache-Control directives.
Explain the behavior and use cases of stale-while-revalidate, immutable, and must-revalidate.
Evaluate the performance and freshness trade-offs of different caching strategies.
